archetype: Organic & Earthy combined with Swiss & High-Contrast
core_aesthetic: The Grandmaster's Study - Parchment & Ink, Vintage Tournament Hall, Architectural Modernism. A mature, disciplined, and inspiring environment.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 for containers. The 'Control Room' grid for dashboards, 'Bento' grid for stats.

layout_modes.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6, dense information architecture
layout_modes.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 or gap-12, asymmetrical bento grids

components.buttons: Flat, angular, 1px border. Primary is solid brand color. Hover uses subtle opacity or slight lift. text-sm font-mono tracking-widest uppercase.
components.cards: Cardless or flat cards with 1px border-border, no heavy shadows. In light mode: white background with subtle border. In dark mode: slightly lighter slate.
components.navigation: Sticky top nav with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80) or solid with bottom border. Z-index 50.
components.chess_board: Hero component. Must scale responsively. No rounded corners on squares. A subtle drop shadow around the entire board. Must use raw HTML/Tailwind or specialized chess library, styled to match our palette.
components.progress_bars: Sharp edges, 4px height. Primary color fill, muted background.
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight for high-end look). Install via: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
components.forms: Shadcn components heavily customized to be flat, with 1px borders and rounded-sm max.

motion.philosophy: Subtle, deliberate, smooth. No bouncy animations. Serious, adult-adjacent tone.

urls.description: Close-up of a vintage wooden chess set on a board with dramatic lighting.
Close-up of a textured stone wall with dark slate rocks, ideal for backgrounds.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Use primary foreground colors appropriately.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI components but strip away the default Vercel look (rounded-md, soft shadows). Make them angular (rounded-none or rounded-sm).
The UI must feel like a mature, focused study environment.
Use CSS Grid heavily for the dashboard layout.
Ensure the chess board retains a perfect 1:1 aspect ratio.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.
